messages.text:
Thank you @testae for starting the handover process!

One of our @amer-services-consultants will generate a Project Brief and link it in this thread. We will tag you when it's ready so please plan to review it for accuracy or missing info.

SFDC Opp Link: <https://stripe.lightning.force.com/lightning/r/Opportunity/006TESTOPPTY12345/view>
What type of support does the user need? Proactive (~5-15 hours of help)
Language:  English
Acme Vacation Rentals [Payments] - $14M
